text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, February 15. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
